rollback_commands: git revert --no-edit "$(git log --grep='phase(8): use verified imported corpus for discovery and export' -n 1 --format=%H)"
tested_against: baseline_main_sha and Phase 8 PR head; no database or data migration rollback required
rollback_steps: Revert the Phase 8 squash commit through the protected-main PR path using the recorded command sequence.
Run dependency audit, lint, and production build after the revert.
Verify /create and /v1/discover return the previous bounded creator corpus.
